'''Rycrit stew''' was a common [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dish, made from [[Rycrit/Legends|rycrit]] meat.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] era, [[Mal'aa's Kitchens]] was a restaurant in the city of [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]] which served rycrit stew. Bowls of rycrit stew were often served with [[Fungus ale|fermented fungus ale]], [[munch-fungus bread]], and raw [[Munch-fungus/Legends|munch-fungus]] soaked in a warm broth. A full rycrit stew meal could be had for about five [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Many [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] prized [[Mal'aa]]'s stew, often buying pots of stew to take with them on their trips.
